message:
Running command: # ABC technology mapping phase detected - synthesis progressing!
# Monitor intensively for Yosys completion
SYNTH_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 144); do
  sleep 300  # 5 min
  
  Y_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRAIN_LINES=$(wc -l < /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  NL=$(ls -s "$SYNTH_DIR/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  REPORTS=$(ls "$SYNTH_DIR/reports/" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ')
  ABC=$(ls -t "$SYNTH_DIR/AREA"* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} Yosys=${Y_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | drain=$DRAIN_LINES"
  [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  NETLIST: $NL"
  [ -n "$REPORTS" ] && echo "  reports: $REPORTS"
  [ -n "$ABC" ] && echo "  abc: $ABC ($(stat -c%s $ABC 2>/dev/null) bytes)"
  echo ""
  
  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane DONE! ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    break
  fi
done
